calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Poppen (415-675-3470) of Bryan Cave for Recontrust Company and Bank of America, defendants and moving parties / Nicole Henderson (925-932-0170) of Law Offices of Kenneth R. Graham for Regina A. Finuliar, plaintiff and opposing party, via CourtCall

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A. and BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend to allege tolling and posting of amount of tender with court required. Moving party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-16-2012 Continued To Oct-31-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A. And BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to October 31, 2012. Plaintiff shall file and serve substantive opposition, if any, no later that October 22, 2012. Defendant shall file and serve its reply, if any, no later that October 26, 2012. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-10-2012 Continued To Oct-16-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A. A CORPORATION, BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. is
Continued to October 16, 2012 on court's own motion. Judge A James Robertson, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/AJR)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-28-2012 Continued To Oct-10-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A. and BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT will be heard on October 10, 2012 at 9:30am in department 501, the housing court. The parties are required to provide courtesy copies of all papers filed in support and opposition to the demurrer, including a copy of the operative Complaint, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, to Department 501 no later than 4pm September 28, 2012. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Page Perry of Bryan Cave LLP (415-675-3400) appearing for defendant Bac Home Loans Servicing, LP moving party. No other appearance.

Court adopted its tentative ruling, DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA AND RECONTRUST COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend as to all causes of action to allege tender and tolling of Statute of Limitations. Order signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, not reported. (501/REQ)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-14-2012 Continued To Jul-16-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR BY MERGER, RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Continued to July 16, 2012 to be heard in Department 501 by Judge Quidachay at 9:30am. All parties shall comply with San Francisco Local Rules 2.6B and 2.6C by providing courtesy copies of the moving papers, opposition papers, and operative complaint to Department 501 by June 20 at 4pm with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
